sections.description: AI-powered CSS/JS asset scanner for WordPress.
sections.changelog: Version 1.7.15 adds Extra Time: opt any URL into a longer probe budget for +1 credit. Step 1 gains a per-URL Extra Time toggle, bulk Extra-Time filters, and a +1/ET credit badge. Step 4 gains per-URL Extra Time checkboxes (paging-safe) with an all-on/off toggle, plus a 'Rescan ET Candidates' button that reloads Step 1 with the checked ET URLs pre-selected and Extra Time pre-checked. The Extra Time count is reserved and charged through the SaaS (N+M). When a flagged URL runs out of probe time, the scanning service spawns a fresh-budget continuation job to recover more unloads. The continuation feature is off by default on the scanning service until enabled.
